case_title: DENISE ADAMS VS. TEWFIK K. KRIDECH

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADAMS, DENISE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KRIDECH, TEWFIK K. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-07-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KRIDECH, TEWFIK K.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES INVALID SERVICE. (NO PROOF OF MAILING FOR SUB-SERVICE) CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
